Wife is a calculative & a Teacher (Maths Teacher)
If Venus is having Kuja + Budha combination in 2nd &
Saturn in 5'h she will be of mathematical teacher. lfVenus has

Wife wiD have an ordinary Job:
If there is Saturn+ Ketu in 2•d or in 5'", 9'h to Venus, the
native will have an ordinary job.lf there is a combination of Mars
+ Ketu in the 5* or 9'h to Saturn, then also the native will have an
ordinary job.
Wife will have multi-storied building:
If Venus is posited in exalted sign or in own house & has
combined with Rahu she will have multi-storied buildings and
grandeur richness I affluence.
Wife will have knowledge of Veda I Spiritual:
' If Saturn, Jupiter are posited in 2"d to Venus or combined
with .Venus she will have knowledge on Spirituality.
